summary: Iteration 10: P0 (coupons + streak), P1 (payments + reports), P2 (UI/UX + role-based access) - ALL TESTS PASSED. 27 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully verified for Dashboard, Coupons, Payments, Reports, and Admin pages.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/login - authenticates maria@tudoaqui.ao (admin role)
✅ Backend: GET /api/coupons/available - lists coupons filtered by user tier
✅ Backend: GET /api/coupons/available?order_type=tuendi - filter by module works
✅ Backend: GET /api/coupons/validate/TUENDI20 - validates 20% discount coupon
✅ Backend: GET /api/coupons/validate/COMIDA10 - validates restaurant coupon
✅ Backend: GET /api/coupons/validate/INVALIDCODE - returns 404
✅ Backend: POST /api/coupons/apply - calculates discount correctly
✅ Backend: POST /api/coupons/create - admin creates coupon
✅ Backend: GET /api/coupons/admin/all - admin sees all coupons
✅ Backend: GET /api/streak/ - returns streak info with milestones (3d, 7d, 14d, 30d)
✅ Backend: POST /api/streak/checkin - awards points with multiplier
✅ Backend: GET /api/streak/leaderboard - returns top streaks
✅ Backend: GET /api/payments/methods - lists 4 methods (Multicaixa, Unitel Money, BAI Paga, Transferência)
✅ Backend: POST /api/payments/create - creates payment with reference and confirmation code
✅ Backend: POST /api/payments/confirm - confirms payment with correct code
✅ Backend: POST /api/payments/confirm - rejects wrong confirmation code
✅ Backend: GET /api/payments/my-payments - lists user payments
✅ Backend: GET /api/reports/admin/sales/summary - returns summary with IVA 14%
✅ Backend: GET /api/reports/admin/sales/csv - CSV download works
✅ Backend: GET /api/reports/user/history/summary - user history summary works
✅ Backend: GET /api/reports/user/history/csv - user CSV export works
✅ Backend: Reports different periods (today, week, quarter, year) work
✅ Backend: Admin role can access admin reports
✅ Backend: Admin role can create coupons
✅ Backend: Admin role can list all coupons
✅ Backend: Bronze user tier filtering (VIP500 not visible)
✅ Backend: Tier restriction on VIP coupon
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows streak badge (1 dias)
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows quick tools (Cupons, Pagar, Convidar, Relatórios)
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows admin button (Shield icon)
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows Relatórios Admin card for admin users
✅ Frontend: Coupons page lists 5 available coupons with correct info
✅ Frontend: Coupons page validate promo code shows dialog with discount info
✅ Frontend: Payments page shows all 4 payment methods with processing times
✅ Frontend: Payments page create payment shows dialog with reference + confirmation code
✅ Frontend: Payments page has Pagar/Histórico tabs
✅ Frontend: Reports page shows admin view with IVA calculation
✅ Frontend: Reports page shows stats (Pedidos, Corridas, Entregas, Total Transações)
✅ Frontend: Reports page period selector works (Hoje, Semana, Mês, Trimestre, Ano)
✅ Frontend: Reports page has Exportar CSV button
✅ Frontend: Admin page accessible from dashboard admin button
✅ Frontend: Admin page shows system stats and payment config
critical_code_review_comments: Coupon tier filtering working: VIP500 (gold+ only) correctly hidden from bronze users
Streak milestones: 3 days (2x), 7 days (3x), 14 days (5x), 30 days (10x) - properly configured
Payment gateway SIMULATED: Confirmation codes generated locally, no real API calls
IVA 14% calculated correctly in admin reports
Role-based access: admin users see admin button, admin reports card, can access /admin page
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0/P1/P2 features fully verified. Coupons system with tier filtering, Streak system with milestones, Payments with 4 methods (simulated), Reports with CSV export and IVA calculation. Admin role-based access working. All pages (Dashboard, Coupons, Payments, Reports, Admin) rendering correctly. Payment gateway is MOCKED/SIMULATED.
